title: The Backrooms Untold & FNAF
description:
You enter the Backrooms, and you are instantly put into a situation where you don't want to be. You, as a Minecraft player, have to escape the Backrooms without dying or being caught.

This mod will be updated almost every week!
body:
This is the Backrooms Untold!

In this mod, you will find yourself creating and imagining your own things for Backrooms levels, to build what you believe should be the Backrooms!

You can create your own Backrooms, or you can go to this link... (in the future) for the map that we used!

Use this mod to make your own Backrooms map, and build anything else you want with the blocks and items that come in store! (So far, only blocks are available to players.)

You should download this Backrooms Untold mod, because it fun and I will soon have a beta (or alpha) version of my map out, as well as a link to my friends mod that you will need for the map. I made this mod for players so they can have fun and do stuff with Backrooms themed blocks, that they couldn't before.

[There is nothing you else you need to know before download (so far...) If you need to know about any other mods that might be useful or handy for you, check out the Wiki Page linked.]

I made this mod, but the map needs another mod, which is made with my friend. Here is his page... (in the future).

Wiki Page (here as well):
[https://modrinth.com/mod/backrooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/backrooms)

[Not too much work on the FNAF part of the mod for right now.]
